summary: Implemented 3D point cloud base geometry system (US-031). Added maxPoints to QualityProfile (low=200, medium=500, high=1200). Created pointCloud.ts with a GeometrySystem that generates a seeded procedural 3D point cloud using hybrid sphere-shell + interior volume sampling, producing non-zero Z-depth with full spherical distribution. Camera drift via mesh Y-rotation and Z-breathing creates parallax. Audio reactivity (bass macro drift, treble jitter), pointer disturbance, and reduced-motion support are implemented. Registered as third mode in ModeManager. All 20 point cloud tests pass, full suite (463 tests) green, build succeeds.
